name: node-normalize.css
title: node-normalize.css
description:
Modern alternative to CSS resets
Normalize.css makes browsers render all elements more consistently and in
line with modern standards. It precisely targets only the styles that need
normalizing.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-normalize.css because Modern alternative to CSS resets.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-normalize.css as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-normalize.css with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-normalize.css --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
